text: let's try freezing the aim whose handle is not being dragged while dragging connection handles in graph view

status.comment: Implemented layout-handle freeze behavior for graph view: dragging one connection handle now marks the opposite endpoint aim as frozen during layouting. Changes: packages/frontend/src/components/GraphFlowHandle.vue (activeAimId/frozenAimId metadata), packages/frontend/src/stores/map.ts (LayoutCandidate fields), packages/frontend/src/composables/useGraphSimulation.ts (skip physics updates for frozenAimId while layouting). Added focused tests in packages/frontend/src/components/__tests__/GraphFlowHandle.spec.ts verifying both handle directions map to opposite frozen aim. Verification: npm run test:unit -w frontend -- src/components/__tests__/GraphFlowHandle.spec.ts PASSED (2/2). Full frontend type-check remains failing due to existing unrelated baseline errors.
